---
id: add-functional-group-scope
title: "Grant a scope to a FUNCTIONAL group"
description: "Adds the scope to the group's auth.group_scopes bundle. The scope must be a member of the system scope catalog (400 if unknown). Every current member's cached scope resolution is invalidated immediately."
sidebar_label: "Grant a scope to a FUNCTIONAL group"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "put api-method"
info_path: reference/api/trms-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Grant a scope to a FUNCTIONAL group"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"put"}
  path={"/api/v1/admin/functional-groups/{id}/scopes"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Adds the scope to the group's auth.group_scopes bundle. The scope must be a member of the system scope catalog (400 if unknown). Every current member's cached scope resolution is invalidated immediately.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>

  {...require("./add-functional-group-scope.ParamsDetails.json")}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

  {...require("./add-functional-group-scope.RequestSchema.json")}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

  {...require("./add-functional-group-scope.StatusCodes.json")}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
